Generated Narrative: ValueSet fr-vs-medication-translation-document

This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

  • Include all codes defined in https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/terminologie-bdpm version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server)
  • Include all codes defined in https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/terminologie-cip_ucd version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server)
  • Include all codes defined in https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/terminologie-atc version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server)
  • Include all codes defined in https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/terminologie-medicabase version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server)
  • Include all codes defined in https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/terminologie-nuva/ version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server)
